title: parabenzoin praecox
intro: Parabenzoin praecox, also known as storax, is a type of tree resin that is derived from the Storax tree, native to Asia Minor. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of parabenzoin praecox include relief from skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its ability to reduce pain and inflammation. Parabenzoin praecox can be prepared into various herbal products, including salves, ointments, and tinctures, which can be applied topically to the affected areas.
